channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Memories, Remedies and Local Anecdotes from Across Australia
item.description: This Column 8 article compiles quirky, humorous, and nostalgic stories from readers around Australia. Margaret Grove recalls a visit to a pub in Baradine, where the wine options were simply red or whi...

item.title: Liverpool searching for top winger to replace Mohamed Salah
item.description: Mohamed Salah has confirmed he will leave Liverpool at the end of the 2025/26 season, bringing an end to a glorious chapter in the club’s history. The 33-year-old, who joined Liverpool from AS Roma in...

item.title: North American Jewish communities increase security amid heightened global terror threats
item.description: Since the Hamas attack in Israel on October 7, 2023, Jewish communities in North America have been on heightened alert due to a notable surge in antisemitic incidents. Recent weeks have seen multiple ...

item.title: US Organization and Rungwe College Boost Tourism by Promoting Local Attractions to American Tourists
item.description: In a bid to increase tourism in Rungwe District, the Teaching Artist Institute (TAI), a US-based organization, has partnered with Rungwe International College of Business and Entrepreneurship Developm...

item.title: Riz Ahmed’s Bait: A Sharp, Humorous Take on Fame and Family
item.description: Bait is a clever six-episode series created by Riz Ahmed, blending semi-autobiographical storytelling with biting industry satire. Ahmed stars as Shah Latif, a rapper-turned-actor from a lively West L...

item.title: Tamil Nadu CM criticises Centre for focusing on delimitation amid cooking gas crisis
item.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister M.K. Stalin has accused the BJP-led Centre of using the issue of delimitation to divert public attention away from the ongoing cooking gas shortage. Stalin stated that the sh...

item.title: Tanzania Signs Niobium Deal to Boost Mineral Production and Trade
item.description: Tanzania has signed a significant deal with Panda Hill Tanzania Limited, a US-owned company, to boost the production and processing of niobium, a strategic metal critical for steel strengthening and h...

item.title: Gatchalian pushes for coordinated national plan to manage rising oil prices
item.description: Senator Sherwin Gatchalian has urged the Philippine government to develop a unified national contingency plan in response to the ongoing oil crisis. Rising oil prices, influenced by global tensions in...

item.title: PMD issues weather forecast for Karachi and Sindh with expected rain and thunderstorms this week
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has issued its daily weather outlook predicting rain and thunderstorms in Karachi and various districts of Sindh province. According to the report, a weste...

item.title: Karachi’s Local Names Tell the City’s Rich History
item.description: Karachi’s history is deeply embedded in the names of its areas. From its beginnings as the small fishing settlement of Kolachi, the city’s localities reflect various stages of its evolution. Names lik...

item.title: President Ruto Ends Nyanza Tour with Promises of Inclusive Growth and Lake Victoria Investments
item.description: President William Ruto has wrapped up a four-day working visit to the Nyanza region, reaffirming his government’s pledge to promote inclusive and fair development for all Kenyans. He acknowledged that...

item.title: Marcos to decide on oil tax reduction bill this week
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. announced that he may finalize and sign a bill reducing excise taxes on oil products by Wednesday. The measure, backed by both chambers of Congress, aims to m...

item.title: Pakistan’s Mediation Offers Hope for De-escalation Between US and Iran
item.description: The editorial discusses a moment of respite in the tense US-Iran standoff after President Donald Trump decided to step back from his threat to bomb Iranian energy facilities unless Tehran reopened the...

item.title: Lawyer shot dead after speaking to car guard in Joburg CBD
item.description: Chinette Gallichan, a lawyer working on a case related to the unfair dismissal of miners, was tragically shot dead in the Joburg CBD. Before the attack, she exchanged a brief and friendly conversation...

item.title: Tanzania co-ops urged to adopt digital scales for transparency and proper payments
item.description: Tanzania Cooperative Development Commission (TCDC) imeongeza msukumo kwa ushirika za wakulima kutumia mizani ya kidijitali ili kupunguza udanganyifu, kuongeza uwajibikaji na kulinda maslahi ya wakulim...

item.title: Tanzania signs major niobium mining and processing agreement with US firm
item.description: Tanzania government don finalize agreements with Panda Hill Tanzania Limited, which na US-owned company, to speed up production and processing ya strategic minerals, especially niobium. The project ip...

item.title: Parliament Budget Session Update: Nirmala Sitharaman's Response to Finance Bill 2026 in Lok Sabha
item.description: The ongoing Budget session of Parliament on March 25, 2026, saw Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman responding to the discussion on the Finance Bill 2026 in the Lok Sabha. The bill is a crucial ...

item.title: Tanzania Invites Austrian Investors to Support Vision 2050 Economic Growth
item.description: Tanzania is actively seeking to attract more investment from Austria, with 17 Austrian-backed projects already registered in the country, valued at 36.14 million USD (about 92 billion Tanzanian Shilli...

item.title: Nationwide Transport Strike Set for Two Days Amid Rising Fuel Costs
item.description: Various transport and urban poor organizations across the Philippines are set to join a nationwide transport strike lasting two days in response to the recent surge in fuel prices. The move comes as l...

item.title: Naira Shows Slight Recovery Against Dollar on March 25, 2026
item.description: Today, March 25, 2026, the Nigerian Naira dey show small recovery as the week midpoint reach. For the official market, early trades show say the Naira don firm small, opening around ₦1,375.26 and late...
